base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should reduce or reroute the specific charm-pin high-extension/recent-high-rejection tail that produced -527 MAE, while preserving the 34-trade charm_pin_pullback_long edge as much as possible. Promotion requires total net profit >=98% of run_001, charm-pin PnL retention >=90%, trade count drop <=10%, pnl/exposure flat or better, and worst MAE improving toward <= -403. Main risk is that these dynamic-VWAP/rejection knobs are inactive or overlap too much with the protected fast extended-VWAP winners.
label: charm-pin-dynamic-rejection-box
rationale: The leader is plateaued at run_001/run_025 metrics, so the next useful experiment should not be another take-profit run or broad global filter. The best available config-only move is a profile-scoped charm_pin_pullback_long test because that profile contributes $1237.7 over 34 trades with fast median hold, but owns the global -527 MAE. This tests the strategist's charm-pin split thesis using existing profile keys rather than global extended-VWAP rejection tightening, which would conflict with protected extended-VWAP winners.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Charm Pin Avoid Dormant Split Probe
